nasb.text: Then they will cry out to the Lord, But He will not answer them. Instead, He will hide His face from them at that time Because they have practiced evil deeds.

esv.text: Then they will cry to the Lord, but he will not answer them; he will hide his face from them at that time, because they have made their deeds evil.

cnv.text: 那時，他們要向耶和華呼求， 耶和華卻不應允他們。 到那時，耶和華必掩面不顧他們， 因為他們行了惡事。”

ccb.text: 你们遭难的时候， 向耶和华呼求， 祂必不应允你们。 因你们的恶行， 祂必掩面不顾你们。”
